title: Contact - DKU
description: Contact Duke Kunshan University by call or Email. DKU Emergency call: +86 512 3665 7110
text:
Contact
Thank you for your interest in Duke Kunshan University. Please use the form below to contact us with questions or comments about Duke Kunshan. You can also contact us directly through the following:
Phone
China: +86 512 5777 9988U.S.: +1 919-613-5416
In case of an emergency, please call: +86 512 3665 7110
Mail
No. 8 Duke Avenue, Kunshan, Jiangsu Province, China 215316

Undergraduate Programs
Undergraduate admissions
Prospective Chinese students: china-applications@dukekunshan.edu.cnProspective International students: intl-admissions@dukekunshan.edu.cnTo join our mailing list, please click here.
Admitted students: ug-admitted@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Undergraduate Studies
Email: ugstudies@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Graduate Programs
Graduate admissions
Prospective students: admissions@dukekunshan.edu.cnAdmitted students: please contact the respective programs
Master of Engineering in Electrical and Computer Engineering
Email: dku-ece-admission@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Master of Environmental Policy
Email: iMEP@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Master of Management Studies
Email: mms-education@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Master of Science in Global Health
Email: gh-education@dukekunshan.edu.cn
Master of Science in Medical Physics
Email: dku-grad-admissions@duke.edu
